revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks

Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Mbox templates]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Use different template to comply with [[WP:BRINT]] standards since this template is essentially a navbox
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = nowrap | bodystyle = width:auto;padding-bottom:0.6em;line-height:1.25em; | abovestyle = font-size:inherit; | above = Message box
meta-templates | labelstyle = margin:0;padding:0 0.3em 0;text-align:center;font-weight:normal; | datastyle = margin:0;padding:0 0.5em 0 0; | label1 = ''template'' | data1 = ''context'' | label2 = {{tl|Ambox}} | data2 = article | label3 = {{tl|Cmbox}} | data3 = category | label4 = {{tl|Imbox}} | data4 = image | label5 = {{tl|Tmbox}} | data5 = talk | label6 = {{tl|Fmbox}} | data6 = footer / header | label7 = {{tl|Ombox}} | data7 = other pages | label8 = {{tl|Mbox}} | data8 = auto-detect | label9 = {{tlg|Article stub box|alttext=Asbox}} | data9 = article stub | label10 = {{tl|Dmbox}} | data10 = disambiguation }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
